title: 'Orchestrated by BJP': CJP's big claim after attack on Abhijeet Dipke; 5 arrested
content: Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, was slapped by youths during a protest in Jaipur.  The incident occurred at Shaheed Smarak during a demonstration over alleged NEET paper leaks and unemployment.  Police arrested five individuals following a scuffle between the accused and Dipke's supporters.  The protest continued with participants demanding action against corruption and examination irregularities.

title: 150 kph and rising: Ashok Sharma gets India A call-up
content: Ashok Sharma's rapid rise continues as the 23-year-old pacer earns an India A call-up for the Sri Lanka tri-series after replacing injured Yudhvir Singh. Fresh from a domestic switch to Gujarat, the speedster now has a golden opportunity to push his case for higher honours.

title: 'Forced to chant in Urdu, eat meat': Army officer's wife claims rape, forced conversion in Nagpur
content: A married woman in Nagpur has accused her former acquaintance and his associates of rape, blackmail, and forced religious conversion. She alleges she was drugged, photographed in compromising positions, and extorted. The accused reportedly performed conversion rituals, declared her married to one of them, and forced her to eat meat before further assaults.

title: Billionaire Bill Ackman slams Bernie Sanders for attacking Musk’s trillionaire status
content: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman lauded Elon Musk's trillionaire status, achieved through SpaceX's IPO, countering Senator Bernie Sanders' criticism. Ackman argued Musk's ventures, like Starlink, bring global benefits such as low-cost internet and educational access, driving economic growth and innovation. He emphasized Musk's wealth is tied to company value, not cash, and that such entrepreneurs deserve appreciation for advancing humanity.

title: Watch: Egg hurled at TMC MLA Kunal Ghosh outside Mamata Banerjee's residence
content: TMC MLA Kunal Ghosh faced an egg attack outside Mamata Banerjee's Kalighat residence. A youth threw an egg at Ghosh as he spoke to reporters. The accused claimed Ghosh had committed atrocities. Ghosh condemned the incident as planned hooliganism and questioned security. He stated the act would not deter him. Police action was pending.

title: Almost a year after giving engineers Claude and Cursor, Disney says, 'minimise AI-coded products'
content: Disney is urging its engineers to use AI tools like Claude and Cursor efficiently, focusing on boosting development speed without compromising code quality. The company aims to prevent AI-generated products from failing post-release, emphasizing productivity over excessive AI token usage. This strategic push follows a failed billion-dollar partnership with OpenAI.

title: The Mamdani Effect? Arsenal, New York Knicks title wins create a new sporting superstition
content: While the Mamdani Effect might sound like a boost for progressive causes since the election of New York’s first Muslim mayor, it’s actually what The Athletic called a Zohran Mamdani sports summer, after two of his teams, Arsenal and Knicks, ended historic trophy droughts.

title: Sooryavanshi, Tilak, controversy and Super Over drama: How it unfolded
content: A Tri-Nation A Series match between India A and Sri Lanka A descended into chaos with a controversial tie, a Super Over, and heated exchanges. Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was at the center of the drama, involved in arguments with umpires and Sri Lankan players after India's defeat.

title: Sooryavanshi clashes with Sri Lanka players after India A defeat - Watch
content: The incident took place after the final ball of the Super Over. Chasing 19 for victory, India A needed eight runs off the last delivery. Sri Lanka A pacer Kugathas Mathulan bowled a yorker, and Vaibhav failed to make contact as Sri Lanka A sealed the win.

title: US senator says Tesla benefited from govt support, Elon Musk replies
content: Elon Musk has refuted claims that his companies, Tesla and SpaceX, owe their success to government aid, stating such incentives represent less than 2% of their value. The debate ignited between Senators Mike Lee and Ed Markey over taxpayer contributions to Musk's wealth. Musk asserted that removing EV tax credits actually boosted Tesla's market share.

title: ‘Let the oil flow’: What Trump’s peace deal with Iran, Strait of Hormuz opening means for India
content: The Strait of Hormuz closure has been responsible for global crude oil prices surging and resulting in an economic shock for the world. India, dependent on imports for almost 90% of its needs, has seen the impact.

title: Kala Hiran row: Producer Amit Jani seeks apology, Rs 50 lakh damages from Govind Namdev
content: The controversy surrounding Kala Hiran, the film inspired by Salman Khan's 1998 blackbuck poaching case, has taken a fresh turn. Producer Amit Jani has now issued a legal notice to veteran actor Govind Namdev after the latter publicly expressed disappointment and concern over the film's teaser. The producer has sought a public apology from Namdev within seven days and demanded Rs 50 lakh as compensation to the production house.

title: Packers, 49ers top landing spots for Jaguars star's rumored trade move
content: The Jacksonville Jaguars’ star player Arik Armstead has been a regular name concerning trade rumors for the last few weeks as he has been rumored to be traded ahead of the new season. Amid this, the Green Bay Packers and the San Francisco 49ers have emerged as potential landing spots for the star player.

title: Topuria hospitalised after Gaethje loss: Rematch next?
content: Ilia Topuria suffered a painful and shocking loss to Justin Gaethje at UFC 250 main card on the White House lawn in Washington, D.C. The previously unbeaten lightweight champion entered the fight as the clear favorite. Many expected him to defend his title successfully against the veteran challenger. However, Gaethje produced one of the biggest upsets in recent UFC history.

title: Aldon Smith's final moments recounted after sudden death
content: Aldon Smith's cause of death revealed? Here's what we know after the former San Francisco 49ers star died at 36. A friend recalled his final day, including a pizza delivery to a homeless charity, a sudden medical emergency, and Smith’s recent struggle after returning to the Bay Area.

title: 'Slap us 10 times': CJP founder says won't get distracted, sends message to 'haters' after attack
content: Following a violent incident at a protest in Jaipur, Cockroach Janta Party leader Abhijeet Dipke called for calm among supporters. He condemned the attack as an attempt to instill fear, stressing that it would not weaken their push for Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation over issues related to examination disputes and rising unemployment.

title: How to reset your metabolism in 7 days: An expert guided plan for women
content: Metabolism is a dynamic process influenced by daily choices, not a fixed number. Sustainable habits like hydration, protein intake, movement, sleep, sugar reduction, and stress management are key to improving metabolic efficiency. A seven-day reset can kickstart these habits, leading to better energy, digestion, and overall health.

title: Patrick Mahomes earns high praise from Andy Reid after extension
content: Patrick Mahomes has signed a massive contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs. This deal makes him the first NFL player to earn over half a billion dollars. The quarterback’s new contract keeps him with the team until the 2033 season. His mother, Randi Mahomes, shared a proud message about his achievements on Instagram. Bill Barnwell predicts a massive contract extension could happen with Lamar Jackson.

title: DRDO succesfully tests India's long-range cruise missile — what makes it hard to intercept
content: In a monumental leap for national security, India's defence capabilities received a boost with the successful test of the Long Range Land Attack Cruise Missile, developed by DRDO. This cutting-edge missile, designed for high-precision strikes deep within hostile territories, not only showcases India's technological advancements but also reinforces its commitment to self-sufficiency in defence manufacturing.

title: Why Army officers will no longer carry swords on parade
content: Army Uniforms-2026 marks the latest chapter in a broader effort to align military identity with contemporary India.

title: Make America Grotesque Again? In Trump's USA, spectacle beats up statecraft
content: Recent White House events showcase a stark divide in American politics. A UFC fighter's controversial speech and a malfunctioning Reflecting Pool, blamed on sabotage by supporters, highlight this. Critics see these as signs of decay. This era blends governance with reality television and internet commentary, marking a surreal moment for the nation.

title: 25 years of Gadar: Ameesha Patel reveals why she never watched the blockbuster in cinemas
content: Celebrating 25 years, 'Gadar: Ek Prem Katha' star Ameesha Patel reflects on its monumental success. Initially warned against the role, she found the cross-border love story, despite its unconventional casting and themes, resonated deeply. Patel only saw the film on the big screen during its 2023 re-release, a surreal experience for the actress.

title: Over $40bn & global fuel crisis: What it cost US and the world to 'open' Strait of Hormuz
content: A costly US military operation, dubbed 'Epic Fury,' aimed at reopening the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in billions spent, hundreds of aircraft lost, and thousands of lives lost across the region. Despite the immense price, Iran maintains the strait was never closed, highlighting a stark paradox in the conflict's outcome and its devastating global impact on trade and energy.

title: India launches producer price index; wholesale inflation gauge to be phased out in five years
content: India has launched its first Producer Price Index (PPI) data for goods and services, marking a shift from the Wholesale Price Index (WPI) which will be phased out over five years. This move aligns with international practices and aims to provide a more accurate measure of price changes from a producer's perspective, aiding in National Accounts compilation.

title: 2 killed, 4 injured after fire breaks out at Mysuru restaurant
content: A devastating fire at a Mysuru restaurant claimed the lives of two cooks, one from West Bengal and another from Nepal, on Monday afternoon. The blaze, believed to have originated from a short circuit in decorative LED lighting on the second floor, also injured four others, including the owner and manager.

title: Watch: Russian bomber crashes in Siberia, crew safely ejects
content: A Russian Tu-22M3 strategic bomber crashed during a Siberian training flight, with its crew successfully ejecting. Unverified footage shows the aircraft plunging into a wooded area near the Angara River, creating a significant smoke plume. Emergency services are at the scene, though details on casualties remain scarce. This incident renews questions about the Russian military's operational standards.

title: Controversy, confusion, and Super Over: India A vs SL A thriller had it all
content: A thrilling Tri-Nation A Series clash between India A and Sri Lanka A in Dambulla ended in a Super Over after a controversial leg bye and a no-ball call. Sri Lanka A ultimately held their nerve to win the Super Over, despite fading light and a spirited chase from India A.

title: Akal Takht declares Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann ‘anti-panth’, 'anti-guru' over viral video
content: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann has been labelled "anti-Panth" and "anti-Guru" by five Sikh high priests following scrutiny of a viral video referencing alcohol. Sources indicate the religious authorities have advised the Khalsa community against associating with the CM. Additionally, AAP Sikh MLAs allegedly supporting a sacrilege law have been summoned.

title: Vir Das slams delivery app after receiving fake watch worth Rs 50,000, calls it a scam
content: Comedian Vir Das alleged receiving a counterfeit Apple Watch worth ₹50,000 from Zepto, expressing frustration over customer service. He shared images questioning the product's authenticity, prompting Zepto to initiate an investigation and arrange a product pickup. The platform emphasized its standard procedure for such high-value items.

title: From Trump and Vance to Sharif and Munir: Key players behind the US-Iran peace deal
content: On June 19, Geneva will host a historic peace treaty between the US and Iran, skillfully facilitated by Pakistan. President Trump expressed enthusiasm for the agreement, which paves the way for the reopening of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: NFL rumors: Eagles, Patriots eye $1.5M rookie amid trade buzz
content: The Philadelphia Eagles are entering a new phase after trading AJ Brown to the New England Patriots. With several receivers competing for roster spots, insider Reuben Frank believes Johnny Wilson could emerge as a surprise contributor. The 6-foot-6 receiver missed last season due to injuries but remains highly valued for his size and blocking ability. Philadelphia views Wilson as a unique low-cost option who could help reshape the offense around Jalen Hurts.

title: Sky-high shipping costs squeeze Gujarat trade margins amid Gulf unrest
content: Gujarat's exporters are facing a severe crisis due to a dramatic surge in logistics costs and trade uncertainties with West Asia. Freight charges have skyrocketed, and disruptions to traditional shipping routes have increased transit times and expenses. This is impacting various sectors, eroding margins and affecting shipment viability.

title: Consumer court orders MG Motor to refund Rs 18 lakh over vehicle defects
content: A Delhi consumer court has ordered MG Motor India to refund over Rs 18 lakh for a defective ZS Astor, citing faulty TPMS and ESCL issues. The company also faces a Rs 4 lakh penalty for failing to honor the warranty and roadside assistance. The court dismissed MG's defense, deeming the failures manufacturing defects.

title: FIFA WC: VAR official's 'neo-Nazi' OK gesture sparks row — what does it mean?
content: Although the match was played in Houston, all video review officials are operating from Dallas during the tournament.

title: Explained: Why India A were penalised 10 runs against Sri Lanka A
content: In a bizarre turn of events during a cricket match, Sri Lanka A was awarded 10 runs before their innings began. India A was penalized twice for repeated pitch infringements by their batsmen, leading to the unusual scoreline. Despite the setback, India A posted 265, thanks to crucial half-centuries.

title: SAAP Chairman praises para swimmers for shining at national tourney
content: Andhra Pradesh won 29 medals, including 15 gold, eight silver, and six bronze in the 26th Junior and Sub-Junior National Para Swimming Championship held recently in Bengaluru

title: Three months on, family of custodial torture victim refuses to receive his body
content: The Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court directed Akash Delison’s father to receive the body by 5 p.m. on Monday (June 15, 2026), adding that otherwise, the State would be directed to dispose of it

title: Dr. YSR Horticultural University launches drone technology training for students
content: Addressing students and faculty members, university Vice-Chancellor says Unmanned Aerial Vehicles are increasingly being used for crop surveillance, precision farming, land mapping, research activities and efficient farm management

title: Trinamool rebels avoided a long-drawn battle for ‘original’ party tag by merging with little known NCPI
content: Since the Centre may bring the Delimitation Bill as early as the monsoon session of Parliament, it becomes crucial that this bloc of rebel Trinamool MPs, which has promised support to the NDA, gets to vote when the Bills are taken up

title: Flight-test of indigenous, long-range land attack cruise missile successful
content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh congratulates DRDO team and industry partners on the success, describes it as a major achievement for India’s defence research ecosystem

title: Protestors seek return of pledged gold in Bank of Baroda ‘loan scam’
content: Raising slogans such as “Return our gold,” the affected farmers, small traders, artisans, and other account holders accuse bank officials of misappropriating gold pledged against loans during a protest at the Eluru Collectorate

title: Ahmedabad Cyber Crime Police bust two networks running NEET scams
content: In two separate cases, they uncovered a Telegram scam falsely promising leaked NEET-UG re-exam papers while a 19-year-old from Bihar was arrested for allegedly hacking hundreds of student accounts to steal their NEET refunds

title: Minister distributes subsidised tractors, equipment to farmers in Palnadu
content: Participating in the coalition government’s second anniversary celebrations, Gottipati Ravi Kumar says the government has fulfilled all promises made while in the opposition and is committed to balancing welfare initiatives with economic development

title: Cultural events, medical check-ups mark ‘Yatri Suvidha Diwas’ at Vijayawada airport
content: Addressing the media, Airport Director says the programmes have been organised to seek feedback from passengers and work on improving passenger-centric facilities

title: CID to probe the death of Bengali actor Rahul Arunodoy Bandyopadhyay
content: The 42-year-old actor, died while shooting for the television series Bhole Baba Par Karega at Talsari beach on March 29

title: Disqualification proceedings against four former MLAs will be taken to their logical end, A-G assures Madras HC
content: AIADMK whip urges the court to prevent byelections in four constituencies vacated by the MLAs and another litigant insists upon a CBI probe into circumstances that led to their resignations

title: In Manipur, mob protests hospital treatment of 3 Kukis injured in armed attack
content: Kuki organisations accuse Naga extremist groups of attacking a village in Kangpokpi district with bombs

title: TMC MP Abhishek appears before ED in primary school jobs scam case
content: Officials said Trinamool Congress general secretary Abhishek Banerjee was questioned over the alleged money trail in the scam.

title: Madras High Court sets aside order appointing interim administrator for Chettinad Vidyashram school
content: Division Bench requests a single judge to rehear the issue and pass fresh orders after affording an opportunity to all the parties to file their counter affidavits

title: Centre warns of potential drone attacks on vital installations
content: Security agencies working on deploying counter-rogue drone systems to safeguard critical assets along the borders

title: Indian commercial ships should avoid Shinas Anchorage, shipworkers’ union tells Centre
content: The Outer Port Limit area in the Sultanate of Oman has emerged as one of the most sensitive and high risk zones for merchant vessels, particularly vessels with Indian or Indian-interest tankers, the Forward Seamen’s Union of India says

title: Congress questions Modi govt’s global outreach amid Pakistan’s rise
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh said the news that the U.S. and Iran will be signing an agreement on June 19 in Geneva to halt hostilities in West Asia is to be welcomed, even though the full details are yet to be made public officially

title: We are the largest parliamentary force from West Bengal: NCPI in a social media post
content: 20 rebel MPs of Trinamool Congress have announced their decision to merge with NCPI after they met  the Speaker of Lok Sabha Om Birla in Delhi on Sunday and submitted a letter to that effect

title: CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke manhandled during protest in Jaipur
content: Police detain two youths in connection with the incident; Dipke’s supporters catch hold of the accused and assault them before police intervened

title: NDA inches towards two-thirds majority in Rajya Sabha; short in Lok Sabha despite TMC rebellion
content: In the Lok Sabha, however, the NDA's numbers can go up to 213 with around 20 more TMC MPs forming a separate group and supporting it

title: Khan Sir got my brother murdered, says rival tutor Raushan Anand
content: Faisal Khan releases video condoling Prince Yadav’s death, demands high-level probe; Prince Yadav’s body was found from a hotel at Biratnagar in Nepal on Sunday

title: Google to set up task force to explore tech tie-ups with Andhra Pradesh
content: Decision follows Andhra Pradesh CM Chandrababu Naidu’s deliberations with Google Asia-Pacific president Karan Bhajwa; Naidu also meets heads of international institutions based in Singapore seeking investments and setting up of their campuses in State

title: KTR blames CM Revanth Reddy for failure to get HMR Phase-II approval
content: He accuses Congress Govt. of prioritising metro connectivity to non-existent city driven by CM’s personal interests

title: India, Slovakia expand scope of partnership with MoUs in defence, tech, labour mobility
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi says the bilateral talks covered cooperation in sectors like automobiles, railways, advanced manufacturing, and green technology. The India-EU Free Trade Agreement will also add momentum to our partnership, he says

title: Nandyal MP and Collector distribute assistive devices worth ₹4 crore to 3,000 beneficiaries
content: Byreddy Shabari says that it was a privilege to distribute devices to differently-abled individuals and senior citizens in the district — a milestone achieved for the first time in the State

title: Yoga a panacea for discipline, health and wellness, says Health Minister
content: Satya Kumar Yadav says prevention through regular yoga practice is far more effective than seeking treatment after illness strikes

title: India, Slovakia Forge Comprehensive Partnership In PM Modi's First Visit
content: PM Modi's visit, hosted by Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico, produced a sweeping joint statement spanning defence, counter-terrorism, trade, technology, energy and culture

title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: JD Vance To Lead Delegation For Iran Peace Deal Signing In Switzerland
content: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

title: 10 Years Of Marriage, 2 Children: Bangladeshi Woman Faces Deportation
content: Tarun Patel, a resident of Lambhvel village, met the woman on social media around a decade ago, and the two eventually entered into a relationship.

title: Once Leh's Only Drinking Water Source, Historic T-Trench Comes Back To Life
content: The spring-fed water body, which once supplied drinking water to the entire Leh city, had fallen into disuse amid unplanned construction. Its restoration has boosted capacity from 3 lakh to 5 lakh litres a day while helping recharge groundwater.

title: White House Hopes US-Iran Deal Text To Be Released This Week: JD Vance
content: Vance also said the United States expects the economically vital Strait of Hormuz would be open without tolls on a long-term basis.

title: "Hindu Religion Not Registered": Mohan Bhagwat On Priyank Kharge Letter
content: "The Hindu religion is not registered, many things are not registered... Registration is needed only by those who want to have funds from the government," Mohan Bhagwat said

title: On Camera, Egg Thrown At Kunal Ghosh Outside Mamata Banerjee Home
content: A man, who was later identified as Chandan, allegedly threw an egg at Ghosh from close range. Though Ghosh tried to duck, the egg hit his head and broke on impact, onlookers said.

title: AI Startup Sarvam Turns Unicorn After Raising $234 Million In Series B Round
content: The funding round was led by HCLTech as a strategic investor, with participation from Bessemer Venture Partners and continued backing from existing investors Khosla Ventures and Peak XV Partners.

title: He Tortured, Raped Bashar Al-Assad's Opponents For Years. Then Came Judgment Day
content: The court said victims were "handcuffed and blindfolded, beaten with various objects and kicked for prolonged periods, folded up inside a car tyre, hung upside down, or electrocuted, often being forced to be naked."

title: Guwahati Airport's Terminal 2 Named Among World's Most Beautiful Airports
content: The newly built terminal has been praised for a design that reflects the identity of the Northeast. Inspired by the Bamboo Orchid, a symbol of the region's biodiversity, the structure blends modern architecture with local cultural influences.

title: Trump Celebrates 80th Birthday As White House Turns Into Cage Fight Arena
content: In unprecedented scenes in the revered seat of American democracy, Trump sat with thousands of cheering fans as Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) combatants beat each other to a pulp.

title: 3 Injured As Clashes Break Out Between Two Groups In Manipur
content: The developments came as Naga organisations renewed their demand for justice for six Naga civilians who were abducted and killed last month, adding another layer of tension to the state's fragile security situation.

title: Combing Strait Of Hormuz For Mines May Take Weeks, Delaying Shipping Traffic
content: It is unclear how many mines Iran may have laid in the strait, which handled 20 per cent of the world's daily supply of oil and liquefied natural gas before the war.

title: At Least 31 Dead After Overcrowded Bus Falls Into Ravine In Ethiopia
content: The overcrowded bus was traveling from the Dessie area to the capital, Addis Ababa, early Monday when it veered off the road and plunged into a ravine

title: Video: 2 killed, Owner Among 6 Injured In Massive Fire At Mysuru Pub
content: Those undergoing treatment in the hospital include customers Sonu, Ramesh, Mahadev Prasad, Prajwal, Avinash, and the pub owner, Pritam Pumeet.

title: Plowing Fields To Touching Clouds: Jewar Airport Changes The Development Story
content: The VIPs on the first flight from Jewar were the very farmers who gave up their ancestral lands for the airport.

title: Iran To Charge Hormuz "Service Fee", Expresses "Deep Mistrust" In US
content: Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said Iran would not charge a toll for ships crossing the key strait under a new framework deal with the US.

title: Who Is Boris Epshteyn? "Psychiatrist, Fixer" And One Of Trump's Key Aides
content: Trump is reportedly said to put him on speakerphone during discussions without informing others in the room.

title: Udhayanidhi demands high-level meeting of police to discuss law and order in T.N.
content: Mr. Udhayanidhi was reacting to the death of a three-year-old child after she was sexually assaulted near Gummidipoondi

title: Former DMK Minister Geetha Jeevan’s acquittal from 2002 disproportionate assets case challenged in Madras High Court
content: Justice G.K. Ilanthiraiyan defers orders on a plea to condone a delay of 839 days in preferring a third party revision against the 2022 acquittal

title: Marginal increase in unemployment rate in May
content: While the rural unemployment increased from 4.6% in April to 5.1% in May, the urban unemployment decreased marginally from 6.6% in April to 6.4% in May

title: AMCA and beyond: What it takes to develop and deploy a fifth-generation fighter jet
content:
Ayush Pandey is a journalist at The Times of India, covering breaking news, politics, defence, and major legal and policy developments across India and the world. His reporting focuses on elections, national security, and institutional affairs, tracking the decisions and conflicts that shape public life.

He specialises in sharp explainers and in-depth feature stories that go beyond headlines to decode political shifts, defence strategy, geopolitical flashpoints, and changing public sentiment.
